|---|---|
| **Deduplication** | Extract `Patient.id` from all `_include`d Patient resources across all 11 queries; take the set union |

| **SNOMED subsumption** | Query 1D (`:below`) is the most exhaustive for SNOMED but requires the server to have the SNOMED ontology loaded |
| **Chemo adherence gap** | Patients on oral olaparib appear only in MedicationRequest (2A), not MedicationAdministration (2B) |

| **Condition status** | Add `&clinical-status=active` to restrict diagnoses to current problems; omit to catch historical/resolved cancer diagnoses |
| **False positives** | Category 3 (surgery) and Category 4 (CA-125) alone are non-specific; reconcile against Category 1 or 2 for confirmation |
